title: Civilian Aviation - Immersive Aircraft
description: An Add-On for the Immersive Aircraft mod, featuring vanilla-styled real life planes and helicopters!
body:
This mod adds a bunch of modern, (mostly) civilian aircraft to travel, transport, explore and decorate your airport!   

In Civilian Aviation, minecraft style and real planes are merged in a carefully crafted, vanilla-faithful way with all the functionalities you would expect!

*   Fancy animation for levers and wings
*   Openable doors! (rmb)
*   Cool unique sounds for every plane
*   Engines sound muffled inside of the plane
*   Many color variants for every plane
*   Custom Spray Gun item for re-painting planes!
*   Upgrades and inventory slots
*   Retractable gear! (Press G)
*   Working Helicopters!

and more, for an immerisve™ flying experience!  
  
  
So without further ado!  
  
![](https://i.imgur.com/apRUgYe.png)

  

# **Skyhawk**

The classic of modern aviation! Quick, and just enough storage for small trips!

 

![Skyhawk](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1543732/description_a28a8836-7ee0-4cd1-9bc3-97c6c1030818.png)

  

# **Comanche**

Planes are cool but one engine is boring? Bring in the Comanche!  
Good speed and generous storage / seating for your friends!

![Comanche](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1543732/description_948732ea-5d83-47d4-98d6-6c5b2142e4b8.png)

 

# **Eclipse**

Need to get to that concert on the other side of the biome ASAP?  
Very fast, but almost no storage

![Eclipse](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1543732/description_99d70b6a-9433-433e-889e-3aaa02a5b6b9.png)

# **Vulcanair**

Ah wait you forgot your stuff at home?  
No biggie, the Vulcanair may not be the fastest, but its got plenty of storage and seats!

![Vulcanair](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1543732/description_71fbcdbc-de02-47c6-afde-205ffc3a9239.png)

   

# **Talon Fighter**

A blast from the past to blast your enemies out of the sky!  
This old fighter is quick and built for combat, not joyrides.

![Talon](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1543732/description_19107620-5ad6-48fc-a312-8fe8e92fb876.png)


# **Elk Bomber**

The Elk Bomber plane is the Talons older brother, slow, but plenty of weapon slots to go with.   
Proves to be an exceptional bomber!

![Bomber](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1543732/description_52974a0f-cc98-456c-ae79-01d037114aaf.png)

 

# **Trimotor**

Are you moving bases? The Trimotor is your friend. Its a slow beast, but the insane storage space is nothing to scoff at!   
And come on, three engines is just a bragging right at this point.

![Trimotor](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1543732/description_5bec2f4b-5b7a-43e1-b7c5-12a5ca61cfa4.png)

undefined

# **Ranger Helicopter**

A medium sized helicopter for easy landing and taking off with some cargo or players on board! Great for expeditions!

![Ranger Helicopter](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1543732/description_15cb66f2-9b42-46da-9096-7322676e4536.png)

  

# **Dragonfly Helicopter**

The Rangers smaller cousin, may not carry as much as its bigger counterpart, but is still great for small, fast trips to mountain bases, islands or other hard to reach places!

![Dragonfly Helicopter](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1543732/description_46f2eef8-5896-4a67-80d2-bd911fe2624b.png)
